{{Quote|Neimoidia is our home, but Duro is our heart and our blood. Let every son and daughter of Neimoidia lift their head high and proclaim "I am Duros," for in this is truth, dignity, and prestige.|Chal Haan in ''[[Encyclical on Historical Greatness]]''|<ref name="The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)">[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']]</ref>}}
'''Chal Haan''' was a [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidian]] and the leader of [[Gender/Legends|his]] [[Species/Legends|people]] at some point following the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation's]] dissolution in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]] until at least the early days of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. He [[Writing/Legends|wrote]] the book ''[[Encyclical on Historical Greatness]]'', in which he proposed the idea of the Neimoidians adopting the culture and heritage of their [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] ancestors, a practice common among the Neimoidian race during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] and beyond.

==Sources==
